title: Production hardening readiness for selected web pilot surfaces

checks.requirement: Supabase Auth must be required for pilot student routes in cloud and production environments.
checks.verification: Set SUPABASE_AUTH_REQUIRED=true and verify unauthenticated student requests are rejected.

checks.requirement: Cloud deployments must use Supabase PostgreSQL through a configured database URL.
checks.verification: Set SUPABASE_DATABASE_URL and run the migration smoke test before release.

checks.requirement: Pilot APIs must expose lessons, sessions, adaptive results, recommendations, and admin overview without development-only endpoints in the public navigation.
checks.verification: Run backend tests and manually verify the public route list before deployment.

checks.requirement: React must point to the deployed backend API and Supabase public project values only.
checks.verification: Set REACT_APP_API_BASE_URL, REACT_APP_SUPABASE_URL, and REACT_APP_SUPABASE_PUBLISHABLE_KEY before npm run build.

checks.requirement: Operators must be able to monitor logins, sessions, adaptive results, recommendations, outcomes, and audit events.
checks.verification: Open the admin dashboard after a test session and confirm each count changes as expected.

checks.requirement: Exports and summaries must use student ids and avoid unnecessary personal details.
checks.verification: Review pilot exports before sharing and remove names, emails, and auth identifiers unless needed for operations.

checks.requirement: The operator must have a rollback path for frontend release failure, backend release failure, and data quality failure.
checks.verification: Confirm rollback steps have named owners and can be executed without schema loss.

checks.requirement: Backend tests, content validation tests, and React production build must pass before release.
checks.verification: Run PYTHONPATH=services/api/src pytest and npm run build from apps/web.

rollback_steps.trigger: Frontend release blocks login or lesson access.
rollback_steps.action: Revert the frontend deployment to the previous successful build and keep the backend unchanged.

rollback_steps.trigger: Backend release blocks session submission or adaptive results.
rollback_steps.action: Route traffic back to the previous backend deployment and preserve submitted attempt data.

rollback_steps.trigger: Data quality failure affects pilot interpretation.
rollback_steps.action: Pause closeout claims, mark affected results as inconclusive, and collect missing records if possible.

privacy_rules: Use student ids in analysis exports whenever possible.
Do not include auth user ids in shared pilot reports.
Do not share names or emails outside the operator workflow.
Keep educational observations separate from raw account data.
Store only pilot-relevant fields in closeout artifacts.
release_decision: Release only when all blocking checks pass, rollback owners are assigned, and the operator can verify a complete test session end to end.
